purpose: Machine-readable manifest of the Econstellar academic games: their certified-strong results, shared invariants, internal cross-links, formal layer, and references. The internal-linking substrate and the queryable surface for MCP-based info exchange. This first instance covers the FRONTIERS V control/evolution series (verified this session); designed to extend to every Econstellar academic game (see _extension).

shared_invariants.plant: x_{t+1}=Phi x_t + B_c u_t + C w; Phi=(1-eta)I-eta D G; B=eta D G>=0; Gtilde=D^{1/2} G D^{1/2} symmetric (D=I in calibration)

STRONG: eta
sigma(Phi)=(1-eta)-eta*sigma(Gtilde)
|lambda_min(Gtilde)|
r(B)
Perron projection (node s_i, edge rank)
connectivity intensity a and r(a)
PROXY: F cascade fragility (requires explicit beta_c)

games.title: Control of a Recovered Dependence Network (static)

key_results.edge_control: convex programme, Perron gradient v_i v_j
key_results.objective_divergence: r(B)/F fall monotone as eta falls but stationary activity U-shaped; interior optimum eta~0.967

Boyd-Vandenberghe 2004

games.title: Evolutionarily Stable Dependence: A Population Game of the Recovered Spectrum and the Selection Intervention

T1_ESS_potential_game.global_stability: strictly concave potential -c I; unique, globally attracting; centrality tax a_i*=(b-kappa L0 s_i)/c

formal.status: lake build exit 0; 12 theorems; 0 sorry; evo_no_oscillation = opposite-signed dual of V.2 turnpike_saddle_signature

games.honest_reframe: the design's Hopf/multiplicity/chaos conjecture was REFUTED and replaced by the proved no-oscillation theorem + transcritical collapse
games.passivity_bridge: no-oscillation theorem = the passivity register of the stable-games property: stable games are passive dynamical systems (Fox-Shamma 2013), and the standard evolutionary protocols on a passive game converge without a limit cycle (Park-Shamma-Martins 2018). Corroborates, does not carry, the directly-proven Jacobian result. Merged into the manuscript discussion 2026-06-18.

games.title: The Network Adaptive Market Hypothesis: Detection, Attribution, and Network-Mediated Efficiency
games.status: submitted / gated (double-anonymised submission to Finance and Stochastics; blinded manuscript + separate title page)

key_results.panel: N=22 effective assets (24 assembled; 19 G20 equity indices + 5 commodity futures gold/silver/natural gas/crude oil/copper; MOEX-Russia and Tadawul-Saudi excluded from headline), T=5,085 trading days, 2001-01-02 to 2025-10-27, 20 annual rolling windows (w=252, step=252), 8 crisis anchors
key_results.eigenvector_hub_Japan: Japan is the eigenvector-centrality top-1 hub in 13 of 20 windows; UK 3, Brazil 2, India 1, Turkey 1; the U.S. tops 0 windows
key_results.us_broadcaster: U.S. is a broadcaster not an attractor: out-strength rank 1 in 9 of 20 windows; never rank 1 on eigenvector / PageRank / in-strength; best eigenvector rank 2 (W17, raw 0.953); GFC-peak (W7) eigenvector rank 9, value 0.150; weighted-directed-betweenness rank 1 in W8 and W13
key_results.spectral_radius_crisis: spectral radius rho(A) elevated GFC-ESDC: W7=0.119, W8=0.118, W9=0.112, W10=0.126 (peak), 20-30% above panel mean 0.098; NOT re-elevated in COVID (W16-W17 ~0.101) nor Russia-Ukraine (W18=0.092)
key_results.neumann_convergence: geometric: panel-median relative l-inf error 0.260 at k=0, 0.025 at k=1, 2.5e-3 at k=2, 2.7e-4 at k=3, 5.5e-11 at k=10; k=1 and k=2 paths account for 99.7% of the network-amplification term; four-digit accuracy by k=3 every window
key_results.phi_kernel_robustness: panel-mean E* = 0.960 linear-absolute (headline), 0.965 Gaussian, 1.080 quadratic; qualitative crisis pattern preserved across all three

games.status: submission-ready manuscript (gated); pre-registered v2, supersedes arXiv:2507.08065 (PI's own v1)

key_results.primary_oos_auc_mcpfm_v2: 0.470 (95% DeLong CI [0.358, 0.591]) on 25-asset 2012-05-21 to 2024-12-30 panel, 56 rolling windows — BELOW the 0.5 random baseline
key_results.hansen_spa_p_primary: 0.031 (rejects null that MCPFM v2 is NOT inferior to the best benchmark; i.e. MCPFM v2 is significantly worse)
key_results.benchmark_aucs_beating_mcpfm: BGLP_PCAS 0.680 [0.551,0.797]; DeltaCoVaR 1% 0.660 [0.543,0.763]; DeltaCoVaR 5% 0.652 [0.527,0.760]; VIX 0.563 [0.446,0.678] — all beat MCPFM v2 at BH-FDR significance

key_results.SOCH_A_scale_ordering: SUPPORTED. peak-scale regression k_hat = 2.97 + 0.58 x (#emerging), t=2.08, p=0.042 (significant)
key_results.SOCH_B_shape_symmetry: SUPPORTED (the sharp test). All 28 of 28 unordered market pairs statistically indistinguishable across direction (p>0.05); every soch_b_holds row = TRUE
key_results.SOCH_C_magnitude_asymmetry: DIRECTIONALLY SUPPORTED but NOT SIGNIFICANT. directional level ratio median 1.18 (CSV 1.176428), advanced-to-emerging dominates in 69% of pairs (frac_gt1=0.6875), one-sided sign test p=0.105 (CSV 0.105057) -- short of significance
key_results.Test4_endogenous_classification: PARTIAL (extremes recovered). India alpha_hat=0.29 and China alpha_hat=0.076 are decisively the slowest adapters (order of magnitude below rest); remaining six markets cluster alpha_hat approx 1.8-3.2 in weakly-identified Nyquist region; median split cannot resolve the fast cluster
key_results.core_theory: receiver-filtering extension: observed transmission = convolution of source generation kernel and receiver absorption kernel -> bi-exponential response -> power spectrum = product of two Lorentzians; slower market sets binding spectral corner alpha_min; Prop: baseline HACI half-life = ln2/alpha_source, independent of receiver rate (the limitation resolved)

games.title: Community Networks of Commodity Markets: Long Memory Models and the Impact of Different Crises
games.status: submission-ready (re-estimated/corrected re-draft; manuscript compiles to 64pp PDF, every reported number traced to liv…

key_results.method: Wavelet Quantile Transfer Entropy (WQTE): MODWT (LA8 filter, J=4 levels; 2-4d/4-8d/8-16d/16-32d horizons) combined with quantile-regression transfer entropy at tau in {0.05,0.50,0.95}; complements symmetric Achard-Gannaz wavelet fractal connectivity (FC)
key_results.panel: 23 major commodity futures, 1991-2025, eight crisis windows
key_results.scale_amplification_16to32d_vs_2to4d: 16-32 day mean |QTE| typically four to seven times larger than 2-4 day (never below three-and-a-half) across crisis periods
key_results.FC_QTE_decoupling: correlation turns NEGATIVE only in the two recent supply-shock crises: COVID-19 (-0.111) and Russia-Ukraine war (-0.041), indicating symmetric co-movement and directional transfer decouple
key_results.top_net_sender_by_regime: Crude Oil (Pre-Crisis), Lean Hogs (Subprime & Sovereign Debt), Oats (Stock Crash 2015-16), Coffee (Pre-COVID), Palladium (COVID-19 & Russia-Ukraine war), Sugar (Post-Crisis Recovery)
key_results.pct_positive_QTE: 100% positive in every period and at every scale (mechanical: QTE non-negative by construction)
key_results.hurst_finding: time-varying Hurst exponents lie close to 0.5 (weak long-range dependence), shifting around turbulence; persistence reduction most pronounced during Russia-Ukraine war when energy complex falls below no-memory threshold

games.title: Fractal Communities and Transfer-Entropy Networks in Commodity Markets: Directional Information Flow and Systemic Risk across Crises
games.status: gated working paper (sole-author, Avishek Bhandari; svjour-style article class; dated June 2026; not yet labelled submi…

key_results.panel: 23 commodity futures, 2 Jan 1991 to 21 July 2025, daily log returns, partitioned into 8 crisis/calm windows (4 energy, 4 precious metals, copper, 11 agricultural, 3 livestock)
key_results.csri_definition: Commodity systemic-risk index (C-SRI) = average directed (effective) transfer entropy over all ordered pairs; ordinal surveillance indicator, NOT a cardinal contagion severity; bias-corrected via effective TE (Marschinski-Kantz 2002, TE minus IAAFT-surrogate-mean)
key_results.effective_csri_positive_windows: Effective (bias-corrected) C-SRI is positive ONLY in 2015-16 Stock Crash, COVID-19, and post-2024 recovery; negative in the two financial crises (subprime, sovereign-debt) and the calm pre-pandemic window
key_results.decoupling_main_finding: Symmetric (fractal connectivity) and directional (KSG-TE) views DECOUPLE: FC hub, KSG leading sender, and WQTE leading sender are three DIFFERENT commodities in every one of the 8 windows; symmetric connectivity peaks in the financial crises, directional flow in 2015-16 and COVID
key_results.node_level_decoupling_rho: Within-window Spearman rank correlation between FC eigenvector centrality and KSG out-strength ranges from -0.34 to +0.46 across windows, no consistent sign, near-zero average
key_results.leading_transmitter: Cotton is the most persistent net transmitter of information, carrying positive net effective flow in 6 of 8 windows; strongest directed links concentrate in the agricultural complex and the grain-energy interface (leading edge inside agriculture in 6 of 8 windows, e.g. wheat->soybean oil, soybeans->oats)
key_results.gpu_cpu_equivalence: GPU CUDA KSG kernel is bit-identical to the CPU reference: maximum absolute discrepancy across windows = 4.4 x 10^-16 (double-precision rounding level); 8 windows complete in approximately 20 minutes on a single NVIDIA RTX 3000 Ada GPU
key_results.robustness_ell2_collapse: Lengthening history to ell=2 collapses agreement (mean Spearman 0.07) due to curse of dimensionality in samples of a few hundred observations; ell=1 is therefore fixed

STRONG: Symmetric/directional decoupling: FC hub, KSG sender, WQTE sender are three different commodities in all 8 windows (Table 2; cmp_fc_ksg.csv KSG_eq_WQ…
GPU CUDA KSG kernel bit-identical to CPU reference, max abs discrepancy 4.4e-16 (double-precision rounding)
Panel stationarity: ADF rejects unit root and KPSS fails to reject stationarity for every one of 23 series (adf_p=0.01, kpss_p>=0.10)
Effective C-SRI positive ONLY in 2015-16, COVID-19, post-2024 recovery; negative in the two financial crises and the calm window (sign deterministic …
Robustness at ell=1: directed-TE rankings stable to neighbour count, mean Spearman 0.77 vs k=4 baseline
Fractal-connectivity |FC| strongest in subprime (0.29, 5 communities) and sovereign-debt (0.27) crises; weakest in calm pre-pandemic (0.11)
PROXY: C-SRI is an ORDINAL surveillance proxy (mean directed effective TE), explicitly NOT a cardinal contagion-severity measure; the manuscript states its …

Cotton 'most persistent net transmitter' rests on net effective flow signs; the manuscript itself cautions the single strongest link/transmitter is n…
C-SRI identified as the commodity-market analogue of the Econstellar engine's experimental connectivity-based G20-equity contagion proxy (an experime…
honest_caveat: NO directed link survives Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction in ANY window — structural, since the permutation p-value is bounded below by 1/(B+1); fo…
Directional signal is 'real but faint and estimator-sensitive'; the leading transmitter differs across TE methods
ell=2 history collapses ranking agreement (mean Spearman 0.07) — curse of dimensionality in samples of a few hundred
KSG leading transmitter coincides with the companion WQTE leader in NONE of the 8 windows (estimator disagreement)
At common sample N*=337 only the post-2024 window is individually distinguishable from zero; all others straddle zero (COVID positive in only 74% of …
Cross-window |FC| vs C-SRI Spearman 0.10 with 95% CI [-0.65, 0.75] spanning zero -> ABSENCE OF EVIDENCE for coupling, not proof of absence (only 8 wi…

games.title: Contagion Channel Identification in Global Stock Markets: A Wavelet Quantile Transfer Entropy Approach
games.status: working paper (gated PDF only; title block dated February 19, 2026; no arXiv id present in file)

key_results.markets: 18 global stock market indices (8 developed, 10 emerging), Jan 5 2004 to Jun 28 2024, 5,275 trading days
key_results.mean_QTE_intensification: mean QTE rises from 0.039 (Pre-Crisis) to 0.066 during GFC (+69%) and 0.114 during Chinese Stock Crash (+192%)
key_results.GFC_SP500_centrality: S&P 500 highest eigenvector centrality 1.000 and out-degree 70.6% during GFC
key_results.top_link: strongest contagion link SHCOMP->DAX QTE 0.231 (Monetary Policy, Pre-Crisis); SHCOMP is source in 4 of top-10 links
key_results.wavelet_scales: MODWT LA8 filter, 6 detail scales D1(2-4d) to D6(64-128d); target scale D5 (32-64 days), quantiles tau in {0.05,0.50,0.95}
